title: Shield Punch
description: A Minecraft mod that can let you dash when holding shield.
body:
**A Minecraft mod that can let you dash when holding shield.**

### 🛡️ Shield Dash Mechanics

Simple Activation: Right-click with a shield in the main hand to activate.
Horizontal Dash: Movement restricted to the horizontal plane, maintaining combat stability  .
Collision Detection: Precise path-based collision detection system.
Cooldown System: Intelligent cooldown mechanism to prevent ability spamming.

### ⚔️ Combat Effects

Knockback: Powerful horizontal knockback against enemies.
Damage: Configurable damage values.
Status Effects: Inflicts Slowness and Nausea.
Multi-Target: Capable of hitting multiple enemies simultaneously.

### 🎨 Visual & Audio Effects

Particle Effects: Dash trail and impact explosion visuals.
Sound Feedback: Impactful strike sound effects.
Customizable: All visual/audio effects can be individually toggled.
### ⚙️ Configuration System

GUI Integration: Built-in ModMenu configuration interface.
Live Adjustment: Modify settings without restarting the game.
Multi-Language: Supports both Chinese and English interfaces.
Advanced Options: Detailed configurations for advanced users.
